features: Dry Active – The highly effective Nivea Dry Active deodorant spray with dual active formula protects against underarm wetness for 48 hours and keeps the armpits pleasantly dry
Fresh scent – The Nivea deodorant with 2 particularly effective antiperspirant ingredients impresses with its fresh, feminine fragrance – for long-lasting freshness
Easy to use: spray the women's deodorant from a distance of 15 cm under the armpit and allow to dry. Skin compatibility is dermatologically tested
Box contents & details: Nivea Dry Active antiperspirant spray (150 ml), 48h protection for dry armpits, item number 88696
Skin and environment - The deodorant spray is not only good for the skin, but also for the environment: the lighter, more sustainable can is made with less aluminium*.
description: Product Description Nivea Dry Active Antiperspirant Spray - Effective Protection with Fresh, Feminine Scent. The reliable effective Nivea Dry Active deodorant spray impresses with 48 hours protection against underarm wetness and unpleasant body odour. Thanks to the highly effective dual-active formula with two anti-perspirant active ingredients, the deodorant spray allows a long-lasting dry skin feeling. At the same time, the skin under the armpits is gently nourished with the skin-active formula with Nivea care complex. With its fresh, feminine fragrance, the antiperspirant gives a pleasant feeling of freshness all day long. Skin compatibility is dermatologically tested. Good for the skin and the environment: the lighter, more sustainable tin is made with less aluminum*. Use: Spray the antiperspirant under the armpit from 15 cm away and allow to dry. The product advantages in detail: 2 highly effective anti-perspirant active ingredients. 48-hour anti-perspirant protection against underarm wetness and body odour. Fresh, feminine fragrance. Skin-active formula with care complex. Skin compatibility dermatologically tested. *In comparison to the previous dose. Ingredients Butane,Isobutane,Propane,Cyclomethicone,Aluminum Chlorohydrate,Isopropyl Palmitate,Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate,Magnesium Aluminum Silicate,Persea Gratissima Oil,Disteardimonium Hectorite,Octyldodecanol,Dimethicone,Propylene Carbonate,Dimethiconol,Benzyl Alcohol,Benzyl Linalool, citronellol, limonene, geraniol, alpha-isomethyl ionone, perfume Directions Spray the antiperspirant under the armpit from 15 cm away and allow to dry.
